regulation: BCA Green Mark 2021 — Section 4.1: EUI data is mandatory for all submissions.
BCA Green Mark 2021 — Section 4.1: EUI must be ≤ 115 kWh/m²/year for Platinum certification.
BCA Green Mark 2021 — Section 4.2: Chiller COP data is mandatory for buildings with central chilled water systems.
BCA Green Mark 2021 — Section 4.2: Chiller plant efficiency must be ≤ 0.65 kW/RT for Platinum certification.
BCA Green Mark 2021 — Section 4.3: LPD data is mandatory for all submissions.
BCA Green Mark 2021 — Section 4.3: LPD must be ≤ 15 W/m² for Platinum certification.
BCA Green Mark 2021 — Section 2: Audit period start date is required.
BCA Green Mark 2021 — Section 2: Audit period end date is required.
